MQTT.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Python MQTT messaging module

topic.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Declare an MQTT topic variable

initialisiere.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Initialise a topic variable with a name and QoS level

mqtt.syntax: mqtt token {token} id {clientID} broker {broker} port {port} abonniere {topic} [und {topic}...] [action {name} requires {field} [und {field}...]]
mqtt.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Create and connect an MQTT client with subscriptions and optional action validation
mqtt.examples: mqtt token Token id `client1` broker `test.mosquitto.org` port 1883 abonniere MyTopic

auf.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Register a handler for MQTT connect or message events

sende.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Send a structured message to an MQTT topic with sender, action, and payload
sende.examples: sende zu OutTopic sender MyTopic action `update` nachricht Data

nachricht.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] The most recently received MQTT message

topic.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] The name and QoS of a topic variable as JSON
